decision_summary: Approve v8.7 as Approval Authenticity and Adapter Capability Alignment, provided no live external provider write is claimed.
rationale: The release corrects v8.6's approval overclaim and makes external-write authorization depend on adapter capability, independent human approval, concrete target binding, credential scope, budget, rollback, and stop boundaries.
recommendation: Ship after provider-execution-approval-audit, release-state-audit, npm test, smoke, and GitHub Actions are green.
expected_user_reaction: The operator should see that v8.7 prevents invalid external-write authorization, not that it executed a provider action.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep v8.6 corrected record as blocked/read-only evidence.
Keep v8.7 release notes explicit that production execution is not proven.
organization_change_recommendations: Require human approval records and provider operation targets before any future write-class provider execution approval can pass.
